title: American talking about finland on mushrooms

transcript.text: Okay, this video is what I think about, let's see what time is it, 2.36. I am two hours in my trip. Yeah, two hours from when I ate it.

This video is what I think about, what an American thinks about Finland. Finland is a very beautiful country. It's got like a million lakes, and you can see them. I didn't film it for some reason. I was just writing.
Maybe my battery was out, but there was like lakes. Every time you turn over, it's lakes. So it's very beautiful. Like the people who live there are loving it.
People are beautiful, too. They've got like, I noticed, they kind of, a lot of them, maybe like they have like Eskimo. They have like bigger face, bigger eyes.
I guess with the eyes. Eskimos are like slimy eyes, but they kind of have bigger eyes. Why not? It's beautiful.
And I'd heard, I'd kind of had an idea about Finland before I got there, that kind of, they were like, they like to make like weird movies.
So they kind of have like a weird sense of humor or something. I know they have a lot of money, but they don't travel much.
Only met like a couple Finnish guys traveling. And my other trips. On this one, I spent a lot more.
But, uh, yeah. Very friendly, though. Because I rode on couchsurfing to like, I don't know, like 20 or 30 or something girls.
Couchsurf. And like a bunch of them were like really friendly and like wanted to let me stay.
And there's actually two who were actually letting me. One who let me stay. And they realized I stayed with.
